data.title: Check Out What Whales Are Doing With MSFT
Zijin Mining Announces $6 Billion Domestic Acquisition, Sets Stage For Lithium Expansion
data.description: China's Zijin Mining Group advancing talks to acquire Zangge Mining Co., valued at $6.4 billion. Deal aligns with Zijin's goal to be top lithium producer.

data.title: Precision BioSciences' Gene Editing Platform Has Differentiated Mechanism, And Is Potentially Competitive: Analyst
data.description: Precision BioSciences gains momentum as iECURE reports positive ECUR-506 data, and analysts forecast significant HBV program-driven stock growth.

data.title: Nvidia, Broadcom Among Goldman Highlights For AI Opportunities
data.description: Nvidia and chip stocks trading lower as Biden administration considers restricting AI chip exports to China. Taiwan Semi reports strong revenue.

data.title: GameStop PR Blitz Incoming? Here's What Public Relations Job Opening Says
data.description: GameStop job posting and a recent report suggest the company could be more active with media in 2025, including appearances by CEO Ryan Cohen.
